mapper.sql: r.id, r.reader_id, r.book_id, r.status, r.queue_no, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.deleted, u.username as reader_username, b.title as book_title
mapper.select: select from reservations r join users u on r.reader_id = u.id join books b on r.book_id = b.id where r.id = #{id} and r.deleted = false
select from reservations r join users u on r.reader_id = u.id join books b on r.book_id = b.id where r.deleted = false order by r.id asc
select from reservations r join users u on r.reader_id = u.id join books b on r.book_id = b.id where r.deleted = false and r.status = 'PENDING' order by r.queue_no asc, r.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into reservations(reader_id, book_id, status, queue_no, created_at, updated_at, deleted) values(#{reader.id}, #{book.id}, #{status}, #{queueNo}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.update: update reservations set status = #{status}, queue_no = #{queueNo}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
